title: Determinism and Time Control

agents.name: Umbrella Agent
agents.date_resolution_rule: Vague terms ('today', 'tomorrow', 'now') resolved to 2026-06-10 (FIXTURE_DATE_UTC) by WeatherFixtureReadTool; date_source field recorded in every output as 'fixture_default' or 'explicit'

agents.name: Clothing Advice Agent
agents.current_date_source: no date dependency — weather snapshot from fixture includes explicit queried_at timestamp in UTC
agents.date_resolution_rule: No date dependency — clothing advice based on current weather snapshot from fixture; queried_at recorded as ISO-8601 UTC

agents.name: Daily Planning Agent
agents.current_date_source: task fixture dates are explicit ISO-8601 strings (e.g. 2026-06-10)
agents.date_resolution_rule: Fixture tasks carry explicit ISO-8601 deadline dates; no local time used; none accept vague terms

summary: All 3 agents use deterministic fixtures with explicit UTC timestamps. No local machine time affects output. All fixture dates are ISO-8601. Vague terms resolved. Timezone recorded in all outputs.
